title: Convert all 1.6 template idioms in one module
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/product_detail_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProductDetailLive) with a render that converts EVERY 1.6 idiom to 1.7: ~L → ~H, <%= live_link %> → <.link navigate=>, <%= live_patch %> → <.link patch=>, <%= if %> → :if, <%= for %> → :for, Routes.product_path → ~p, Routes.image_path → ~p, and <%= error_tag(f, :field) %> should be absent (errors come from <.input>). mount assigns :product %{id: 1, name: "Widget", images: [%{id: 1, url: "/a.jpg"}]}. Do not use any deprecated helper or macro.
tier_rationale: Exhaustive template migration. Any single slip fails.
